valueStreams.name: Scale and Operate a Pan-European Charging Network
valueStreams.description: Deploy, monitor, and optimize a large EV charging network across multiple countries while maintaining high uptime and interoperability.

stages.name: Onboard new charge points
stages.description: Integrate new hardware models and field deployments into the CPMS.

stages.name: Ensure network uptime
stages.description: Monitor performance, detect faults, and resolve incidents proactively.

stages.name: Optimize energy usage
stages.description: Balance load across sites and reduce peak demand costs.

stages.name: Enable roaming
stages.description: Allow external mobility service providers to access the network.

valueStreams.name: Provide Seamless Charging Access Across Europe
valueStreams.description: Enable EV drivers to charge at thousands of third-party networks with a single app or card.

stages.name: Integrate with CPMS platforms
stages.description: Connect to multiple CPO backends via standardized protocols.

stages.name: Authorize charging sessions
stages.description: Ensure instant driver authentication at charger.

stages.name: Reconcile and settle transactions
stages.description: Process billing data and settle with CPO partners.

valueStreams.name: Charge My EV Reliably Wherever I Go
valueStreams.description: Find, start, and pay for charging sessions easily across different networks and countries.

stages.name: Find available charger
stages.description: Search for nearby chargers with accurate availability and pricing.

stages.name: Authenticate and start session
stages.description: Authorize via app or RFID card without delay.

stages.name: Pay and receive receipt
stages.description: Complete payment seamlessly and access session history.

valueStreams.name: Manage and Optimize EV Fleet Charging Costs
valueStreams.description: Control, monitor, and optimize charging expenses for a distributed EV fleet.

stages.name: Provide drivers with access
stages.description: Issue charge cards or app access for public and home charging.

stages.name: Track and analyze charging spend
stages.description: Monitor costs by driver, location, and vehicle.

stages.name: Reimburse home charging
stages.description: Compensate employees for home electricity usage.

operatingModelNotes: The eMobility enterprise architecture domain covers the business, application, data, and technology structures required to run charging networks, roaming ecosystems, driver journeys, and fleet charging operations at scale.
Business capabilities should be mapped to accountable owners and supported by governed application services.
Cross-domain dependencies should be handled through explicit value streams and service contracts.
